scripts.build:win: npm run build:ruby:win && npm run assets:precompile && electron-builder build --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.build:mac: echo 'macOS packaging is not yet implemented in this PR. See CHANGELOG.' && exit 1
scripts.build:linux: echo 'Linux packaging is not yet implemented in this PR. See CHANGELOG.' && exit 1
scripts.dist:all: echo 'Multi-platform packaging is not yet implemented in this PR. See CHANGELOG.' && exit 1
